parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ q: "SELECT s.token_id, s.probability, s.signal, s.prediction, s.model_name, s.model_version, s.scored_at, t.name, t.symbol, t.chain, t.pool_address FROM scores s JOIN tokens t ON s.token_id = t.token_id WHERE s.scored_at::date = CURRENT_DATE AND s.probability >= 0.65 ORDER BY s.probability DESC LIMIT 20" }) }}
